transcript: Speaker A: So, we will incorporate the new data. Parul, any thoughts? Speaker B: Sir, I think, think, think, I think the uanalysis... Speaker A: Never mind. I want the new deck ready by tomorrow end of the day. Speaker C: Yes, sir. Speaker D: Yeah, sir. Speaker C: Uanalysis! She doesn't even know how to pronounce analysis. Speaker D: Even I laughed when I saw you in the meeting. Speaker C: Basic. She doesn't know basic English. I don't know who hired her. Speaker D: Shhh, she will listen. Speaker C: So, let her listen. She will learn something at least. Speaker B: यार, समझ ही नहीं आ रहा मैं क्या करूँ। इस हिसाब से तो मुझे जॉब से ही निकाल देंगे। [Dude, I don't know what to do. According to this, they will fire me from the job.] Speaker E: तुम्हें SpeakX डाउनलोड करने की ज़रूरत है। [You need to download SpeakX.] Speaker B: यार, मतलब टाइम ही कहाँ मिलता है यार? [Dude, I mean, where do I get the time?] Speaker E: बस दिन के 15 मिनट देने होंगे यार तुम्हें। SpeakX की AI टीचर है Sia, वो तुम्हें सब कुछ सिखा देगी। बातचीत करके तुम यूँ इंग्लिश में फ्लूएंट हो जाओगी। [You need only 15 minutes per day. SpeakX's AI teacher is Sia, she will teach you everything. By talking, you will become fluent in English just like that.] Speaker B: ओहो, सच में? अब मैं ट्राई करती हूँ। [Oh, really? I will try now.] Speaker A: Any thoughts? Speaker C: Yes, sir. Speaker B: Sir, I really think we should take some of their points into consideration and really push back on removing the data analysis. I think it's important that we show some of our research and really build trust between them. Speaker A: Good, Parul. That's a very sharp insight. I like your confidence. Speaker B: Thank you, sir. Speaker A: You two need to level up. Speaker C & D: Yes, sir. Speaker A: Okay, back to work. And Parul, I want you to lead the client meeting tomorrow. Speaker B: Okay, sir. Thank you. Speaker C: थोड़ी इंग्लिश क्या सीख ली, बॉस ने सिर पे बिठा लिया। देखना, कितनी अनडिजर्विंग है। फिर भी इसको प्रमोशन दे देंगे। [What did she learn in English? The boss made her sit on his head. Look, how undeserving she is. Still, they will give her a promotion.] Speaker D: सच है। [It's true.] Speaker D: यार, I have had enough of your negativity, man. Hi Parul. Speaker B: Hi. Speaker D: मुझे थोड़ी हेल्प कर सकती हो प्लीज? [Can you please help me?] Speaker B: Sure. Speaker C: पारुल, मैं भी... [Parul, I also...] Speaker B: Yeah, definitely. Speaker F: SpeakX की AI टीचर Sia के साथ आप भी अपनी इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग में कॉन्फिडेंस और फ्लूएंसी डेवलप कर सकते हैं। आपको मिलेगी डेली गाइडेंस, रियल-लाइफ फीडबैक और एक जजमेंट-फ्री एनवायरनमेंट 24/7, जब चाहें, जहाँ चाहें। तो आज ही डाउनलोड करिए SpeakX और खुद को करिए लेवल अप। [With SpeakX's AI teacher Sia, you too can develop confidence and fluency in your English speaking. You will get daily guidance, real-life feedback, and a judgment-free environment 24/7, whenever you want, wherever you want. So download SpeakX today and level up yourself.]
on_screen_text: Meet SIA Your personal AI Teacher, SpeakX
summary: An office worker is ridiculed by colleagues for her poor English pronunciation, making her fear for her job. After downloading SpeakX and practicing daily with the AI teacher Sia, she gains fluency and confidence. She successfully leads a meeting, earns her boss's praise, and wins over her colleagues.
